ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design of the experiment (e.g., between, within) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, archived) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the experiment is conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the experiment has received ethics approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the condition in minutes */,
  "material" TEXT /* Materials used in the condition */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Detailed procedure for the condition */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in minutes */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Detailed procedure for the trial */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the trial */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition the response belongs to */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the response belongs to */,
  "num_responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses collected for the condition and trial */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file containing the responses */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., online survey, in-person) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical result */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the response record the result belongs to */,
  "df_art_omni" REAL /* Degrees of freedom for the omnibus test */,
  "df_param" REAL /* Degrees of freedom for the parametric test */,
  "df_art_con" REAL /* Degrees of freedom for the contrasts test */,
  "t_art_omni" REAL /* t-value for the omnibus test */,
  "t_param" REAL /* t-value for the parametric test */,
  "t_art_con" REAL /* t-value for the contrasts test */,
  "p_art_omni" REAL /* p-value for the omnibus test */,
  "p_param" REAL /* p-value for the parametric test */,
  "p_art_con" REAL /* p-value for the contrasts test */,
  "p_nonparam" REAL /* p-value for the non-parametric test */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the statistical test */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the statistical test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test (e.g., t-test, ANOVA, chi-square) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistical test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, statistician, admin) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., professor, graduate student) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the experiment */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the condition */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the condition */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_access_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the trial */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_access_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the response */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the response */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_access_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the result */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_access_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES statistical_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_versions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_condition_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)
